rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WENDY FU TRUST, DATED OCTOBER 28, 2003, AND AMENDMENTS THERETO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition By Trust Beneficiary Valen Wong To Redress Breach Of The Wendy Fu Trust By Respondent Wanda Lee, Trustee And For Accounting
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Stephen M. Murphy. Before the court is Respondent Wanda Lee's Demurrer to Petition by Trust Beneficiary Valen Wong to Redress Breach of the Wendy Fu Trust by Respondent Wanda Lee, Trustee, and for Accounting. Hearing Required. Remote appearance is available consistent with San Francisco Superior Court Local Rules, rule 14.1(D). To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
